en.summary: In this prophetic tradition narrated through Ibn Abbas, the Prophet Muhammad declares that anyone who desires to share in his spiritual station must pledge allegiance to Ali ibn Abi Talib and follow his designated successors. The Prophet emphasizes that these successors are his own progeny, created from his essence. He delivers the devastating prophecy that his grandson al-Husayn will be martyred and his killers denied the Prophet's intercession.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: Itrati - My progeny/family: the Prophet’s direct descendants through Fatimah and Ali, whom he designates as rightful guides
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: Jannat Adn - Garden of Eden: the highest station of Paradise, described as the Prophet’s personal abode
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: al-Awsiya’ - The Successors/Trustees: the designated spiritual and temporal successors from Ali’s lineage

en.seo_question: What did the Prophet Muhammad say about following Ali ibn Abi Talib and the prophecy of Husayn's martyrdom?

ur.summary: ابن عباس سے مروی اس حدیث میں رسول اللہ نے علی کی ولایت اور حسین کی شہادت کی پیشگوئی فرمائی۔

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: عترت: نبی کریم کی ذریت اور اهل بیت جنہیں آپ نے راہنما مقرر فرمایا
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: جنت عدن: جنت کا اعلیٰ مقام، نبی کریم کا مسکن
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: اوصیاء: علی کی نسل سے مقرر کردہ روحانی جانشین

ur.seo_question: نبی کریم نے علی بن ابی طالب کی پیروی اور حسین کی شہادت کی پیشگوئی کے بارے میں کیا فرمایا؟

tr.summary: Hz. Peygamber Ali velâyetini ve Hüseyin şehâdetini bildiriyor.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: İtret: Hz. Peygamberin soyu ve Ehl-i Beyti
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: Cennet-i Adn: Cennetin en yüce makamı
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: Evsiya: Hz. Ali soyundan tayin edilmiş halefler

tr.seo_question: Hz. Peygamber Ali b. Ebi Talib'in velayeti ve Hz. Hüseyin'in şehadeti hakkında ne buyurmuştur?

fa.summary: پیامبر اکرم به پذیرش ولایت علی و پیشگویی شهادت حسین فرا می‌خواند.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: عترت: ذریه و اهل بیت پیامبر
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: اوصیاء: جانشینان تعیین شده از نسل علی

fa.seo_question: پیامبر در مورد پیروی از علی بن ابی طالب و پیشگویی شهادت حسین چه فرمود؟

id.summary: Rasulullah menyatakan kepemimpinan Ali dan nubuat syahidnya Imam Husain.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: Itrah: keturunan dan Ahlul Bait Nabi
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: Jannat Adn: tempat tertinggi di surga
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: al-Awshiya: penerus yang ditunjuk dari keturunan Ali

id.seo_question: Apa yang dikatakan Nabi Muhammad tentang mengikuti Ali bin Abi Thalib dan nubuat syahidnya Husain?

bn.summary: রাসূলুল্লাহ আলীর কর্তৃত্ব ও হুসাইনের শাহাদাতের ভবিষ্যদ্বাণী করেন।

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: ইতরাত: নবীর বংশধর ও আহলে বাইত
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: আউসিয়া: আলীর বংশ থেকে নির্ধারিত উত্তরাধিকারী

bn.seo_question: নবী মুহাম্মাদ আলী ইবনে আবী তালিবের অনুসরণ এবং হুসাইনের শাহাদাতের ভবিষ্যদ্বাণী সম্পর্কে কী বলেছেন?

es.summary: El Profeta declara la autoridad de Alí y profetiza el martirio de al-Husayn.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: Itrah: la descendencia y Ahl al-Bayt del Profeta
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: Jannat Adn: la estación más elevada del Paraíso
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: al-Awsiya: los sucesores designados del linaje de Ali

es.seo_question: ¿Qué dijo el Profeta Muhammad sobre seguir a Ali ibn Abi Talib y la profecía del martirio de Husayn?

fr.summary: Le Prophète déclare l’autorité d’Ali et prophétise le martyre d’al-Husayn.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: Itrah : la descendance et les Ahl al-Bayt du Prophète
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: Jannat ‘Adn : la station la plus élevée du Paradis
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: al-Awsiyâ’ : les successeurs désignés de la lignée d’Ali

fr.seo_question: Qu’a dit le Prophète Muhammad sur l’obéissance à Ali ibn Abi Talib et la prophétie du martyre de Husayn ?

de.summary: Der Prophet erklärt die Autorität Alis und prophezeit das Martyrium al-Husains.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: Itrah: die Nachkommenschaft und Ahl al-Bayt des Propheten
key_terms.جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ: Djannat ‘Adn: die höchste Stufe des Paradieses
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: al-Awsiyā’: die bestimmten Nachfolger aus der Linie Alis

de.seo_question: Was sagte der Prophet Muhammad über die Gefolgschaft zu Ali ibn Abi Talib und die Prophezeiung des Martyriums von Husain?

ru.summary: Пророк заявляет о покровительстве Али и пророчествует о мученичестве аль-Хусайна.

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: Итра: потомство и Ахль аль-Байт Пророка
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: аль-Авсия: назначенные преемники из рода Али

ru.seo_question: Что сказал Пророк Мухаммад о следовании за Али ибн Аби Талибом и пророчестве о мученичестве аль-Хусайна?

zh.summary: 先知宣告必须接受阿里的权威并预言侯赛因的殉难。

key_terms.عِتْرَتِي: 伊特拉：先知的后裔与圣裔
key_terms.الْأَوْصِيَاءِ: 维迎人：来自阿里血统的指定继承人

zh.seo_question: 先知穆罕默德对于追随阿里·本·艾比·塔利卜以及侯赛因殉难的预言说了什么？

isnad_matn.chain_quality: The chain passes through well-known transmitters including Aban ibn Taghlub (a prominent Kufan scholar) and Ikrama (a noted Meccan mawla of Ibn Abbas), ultimately reaching the Companion Ibn Abbas.

narrators.known_identity: Ja‘far ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur (teacher of al-Shaykh al-Saduq)
al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Amer al-Ash‘ari al-Qummi
‘Abdullah ibn ‘Amer al-Ash‘ari al-Qummi (uncle of al-Husayn ibn Muhammad)

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو أَحْمَدَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ الْأَزْدِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu Ahmad Muhammad ibn Ziyad al-Azdi
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Ziyad al-Azdi (Abu Ahmad), hadith transmitter

narrators.ambiguity_note: Most likely Aban ibn ‘Uthman al-Ahmar al-Bajali, a prominent Kufan hadith compiler, though other narrators share this name.
narrators.known_identity: Aban ibn ‘Uthman al-Ahmar al-Bajali (d. ~170 AH), one of the six companions of Imam al-Sadiq
Aban ibn Taghlub ibn Ribah al-Kufi (d. 141 AH), prominent scholar and companion of Imam al-Baqir and Imam al-Sadiq
‘Ikrimah ibn ‘Abdullah al-Barbari (d. ~105 AH), mawla (freedman) of Ibn ‘Abbas
‘Abdullah ibn ‘Abbas ibn ‘Abd al-Muttalib (d. 68 AH), cousin of the Prophet and renowned Quranic exegete

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَسْرُورٍ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَمِّهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ الْأَزْدِيُّ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبَانُ بْنُ تَغْلِبَ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَحْيَا حَيَاتِي وَيَمُوتَ مِيتَتِي وَيَدْخُلَ جَنَّةَ عَدْنٍ مَنْزِلِي وَيُمْسِكَ قَضِيبًا غَرَسَهُ رَبِّي عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ كُنْ فَيَكُونُ فَلْيَتَوَلَّ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَلْيَأْتَمَّ بِالْأَوْصِيَاءِ مِنْ وَلَدِهِ فَإِنَّهُمْ عِتْرَتِي خُلِقُوا مِنْ طِينَتِي إِلَى اللَّهِ أَشْكُو أَعْدَاءَهُمْ مِنْ أُمَّتِي الْمُنْكِرِينَ لِفَضْلِهِمْ الْقَاطِعِينَ فِيهِمْ صِلَتِي وَايْمُ اللَّهِ لَيُقْتَلَنَّ بَعْدِي ابْنِي الْحُسَيْنُ لَا أَنَالَهُمُ اللَّهُ شَفَاعَتِي

related_quran.context: The Quranic phrase kun fayakun (Be! And it is) is directly referenced regarding Allah's creative command.
The verse of Mubahala identifies the Prophet's closest family including Ali.
The verse commanding love for the Prophet's near kin relates to loyalty to his progeny.
The purification verse about the Ahl al-Bayt connects to description of progeny created from his clay.

key_phrases.phrase_en: may Allah bless him and his family

similar_content_hints.description: The hadith of Manzila, in which the Prophet compares Ali's relationship to him to that of Aaron to Moses.
The hadith al-Thaqalayn, in which the Prophet instructs his community to hold fast to the Quran and his household.
Prophetic traditions foretelling the martyrdom of Imam Husayn at Karbala.
